summary: Designed integration cards (TASK-164): created design tokens JSON (100+ tokens covering card, logo, title, provider, description, OAuth status with 4 states, connect/disconnect/reconnect buttons, footer, scopes badge, skeleton, animations), CSS custom properties with 18 component selectors and 6 keyframe animations including responsive/reduced-motion support, and Tailwind theme extension with colors, spacing, fontSize, borderRadius, boxShadow, animation, and keyframes sections. All 108 tests pass.
